metadata.description: Investment analysis skills + price-alert pipeline for Claude Code. Top-down macro-aware framework, bilingual EN/CN, real data via yfinance + openinsider + FRED. For personal-finance buy-side use (swing / position / LEAPS) — not HFT.

plugins.name: claude-investment-skills
plugins.description: 14 investment skills (analyze-stock, macro-warning, find-alpha, earnings-prep, leaps-screen, narrative-reversal-screen, sector-rotation-analysis, tax-optimize, portfolio-audit, price-alert, etc.) with pre-flight methodology (macro → insider → 3-tier → sizing → tax). Includes Telegram alert pipeline + optional Cloudflare Worker webhook for 1-3 sec NL chat.
